from __future__ import annotations

def same_sequence_scanned_multiple_times_for_related_aggregates_negative():
    values = [3, 8, 2, 5]
    total = 0
    highest = values[0]
    lowest = values[0]
    for value in values:
        total += value
        if value > highest:
            highest = value
        if value < lowest:
            lowest = value
    return total, highest, lowest
